# Sample IOC file for testing
# This file contains various IOC types for search testing

# IP Addresses
192.168.1.1
10.0.0.1
8.8.8.8
1.1.1.1

# Obfuscated IPs
192[.]168[.]1[.]100
10[.]10[.]10[.]10

# Domains
google.com
microsoft.com
evil-malware-domain.com
suspicious.example.org

# Obfuscated Domains
malicious[.]domain[.]com
bad[dot]actor[dot]net

# URLs
https://example.com/malware.exe
http://phishing-site.com/login
hxxp://evil[.]com/payload
hxxps://bad-site[.]org/download

# MD5 Hashes

# Filenames

suspicious.dll
payload.ps1
backdoor.php
trojan.doc
